entradas.original: {\c&HCBCBD0&\fs35\blur1\t(3860,4027,\c&H1A17A7&)\pos(927.04,697.61)}MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM
{\c&HACB2B5&\fs55\blur1\t(1935,2060,\c&H1C2177&)\pos(686.02,320.89)}MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Eyes drained of their life.
{\fad(100,100)\1a&HFF&\blur2\bord0.5}Eyes drained of their life.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The flames at which they gaze.
{\fad(100,100)\1a&HFF&\blur2\bord0.5}The flames at which they gaze.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Now the time has come to leave everything behind.
{\fad(100,100)\1a&HFF&\blur2\bord0.5}Now the time has come to leave everything behind.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}All those memories and the pain of the past.
entradas.traduzido: {\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Todas aquelas lembranças e a dor do passado.

entradas.original: {\fad(100,100)\1a&HFF&\blur2\bord0.5}All those memories and the pain of the past.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}You can't look back at them, and the battle rages on.
{\fad(100,100)\1a&HFF&\blur2\bord0.5}You can't look back at them, and the battle rages on.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Even if lives are burnt to ashes today...
{\fad(100,100)\1a&HFF&\blur2\bord0.5}Even if lives are burnt to ashes today...
{\fad(100,500)\blur1\bord0}...will people still dream about tomorrow?
{\fad(100,500)\1a&HFF&\blur2\bord0.5}...will people still dream about tomorrow?
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}It may be destiny, but
{\fad(100,100)\1a&HFF&\blur2\bord0.5}It may be destiny, but
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}In the skies of despair there rages now a storm.
{\fad(100,100)\1a&HFF&\blur2\bord0.5}In the skies of despair there rages now a storm.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}For whom does the future exist now?
{\fad(100,100)\1a&HFF&\blur2\bord0.5}For whom does the future exist now?
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}A world on the path of destruction...
{\fad(100,100)\1a&HFF&\blur2\bord0.5}A world on the path of destruction...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...with a storm raging through.
{\fad(100,100)\1a&HFF&\blur2\bord0.5}...with a storm raging through.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The ones who have been chosen are...
{\fad(100,100)\1a&HFF&\blur2\bord0.5}The ones who have been chosen are...
{\blur1\c&H141316&\pos(720,680)}ASSAULT ON THE\NPOINT OF NO RETURN
{\fad(200,500)\blur1\bord0}All alone in the deep darkness.
{\fad(200,500)\blur2\1a&HFF&\bord0.5}All alone in the deep darkness.
{\fad(200,500)\blur1\bord0}On a night that swallows up the road.
{\fad(200,500)\blur2\1a&HFF&\bord0.5}On a night that swallows up the road.
{\fad(200,500)\blur1\bord0}Searching on and on for\Nthe memory of the brilliant dawn.
{\fad(200,500)\blur2\1a&HFF&\bord0.5}Searching on and on for\Nthe memory of the brilliant dawn.
{\fad(200,500)\blur1\bord0\t(500,4960,\3c&HAB7129&)}There are times when destiny...
{\fad(200,500)\blur2\1a&HFF&\bord0.5\t(500,4960,\)}There are times when destiny...
{\fad(200,500)\blur1\3c&HAB7129&\bord0}...is a wind that tests your heart.
{\fad(200,500)\blur2\\1a&HFF&\bord0.5}...is a wind that tests your heart.
entradas.traduzido: {\fad(200,500)\blur2\\1a&HFF&\bord0.5}...é um vento que testa seu coração.

entradas.original: {\fad(200,500)\blur1\3c&HAB7129&\bord0}Love is a sky that embraces everything.
{\fad(200,500)\blur2\\1a&HFF&\bord0.5}Love is a sky that embraces everything.
{\fad(200,500)\blur1\3c&HAB7129&\bord0}And in it is the vision of the new day.
{\fad(200,500)\blur2\\1a&HFF&\bord0.5}And in it is the vision of the new day.
{\fad(200,500)\blur1\3c&HAB7129&\bord0}I should revive that warm heartbeat inside me.
{\fad(200,500)\blur2\\1a&HFF&\bord0.5}I should revive that warm heartbeat inside me.
{\fad(200,500)\blur1\3c&HAB7129&\bord0}That frozen dream has begun to shine again.
{\fad(200,500)\blur2\\1a&HFF&\bord0.5}That frozen dream has begun to shine again.
{\blur1\c&H141316&\pos(720,610)}NEXT EPISODE
{\blur1\c&H141316&\pos(720,680)}A STORM RAGING \NTHROUGH
{\i1}The Albion arrived at the\NLa Vie en Rose.
entradas.traduzido: {\i1}O Albion chegou ao\NLa Vie en Rose.

entradas.original: {\i1}They did this to acquire\Nthe new Gundam Unit 03.{\i}
{\i1}However, Lt. Commander Nakato's security unit\Nwas waiting for them there.
{\i1}Contemptuous of Uraki and\Nhis desperate comrades,{\i}
{\i1}Delaz ignited the colony's\Nrelocation propellant
{\i1}The colony, en route to Earth.\NLucette, struck down.{\i}
{\i1}Her death forces Nina\Nto face her destiny.
{\i1}And now, to stop this\Ncolony drop on the Earth,{\i}
entradas.traduzido: {\i1}E agora, para deter essa\Ninvasão em massa na Terra,{\i}

entradas.original: {\i1}Uraki races to confront\Nthe enemy in Gundam Unit 03.
{\i1}Universal Century 0083, November 12th.
{\i1}Operation Stardust, whose objective\Nis to drop a colony on the Earth,{\i}
{\i1}finally reaches its climax.
Port side at ten o'clock!\NOne enemy vessel sighted!
In front of us?
The Earth Orbital Fleet couldn't\Nhave reached us yet!
They said nothing about this...!
I'm going to the comm room!
{\i1}This is the Axis Fleet.
Sorry, but our fleet will just\Nhave to watch from the rear.
{\i1}No matter. Don't feel obligated to us.
{\i1}Just take care of the clean-up.
I swear on the name of Axis!
{\i1}We've come so far..
{\i1}With only these few ships,\NI'm carrying out an operation...
entradas.traduzido: {\i1}Com tão poucos navios,\NEstou executando uma operação...

entradas.original: {\i1}...that would have once required\Nhalf of the entire Zeon fleet.
entradas.traduzido: {\i1}...que um dia teria exigido \Nmetade da frota inteira de Zeon.

entradas.original: It's nothing but a hulk!
What's the current situation?
Sir!
The colony is now halfway between\Nthe Earth and the Moon.
The prototype Gundam Unit 03\Nhas made contact with them.
And the neutral Axis fleet is\Npulling back to the rear.
The enemy learned their lessons\Nwell from the One Year War.
This is a brilliantly-executed\Ncolony drop operation.
Even Gundam Unit 03\Ncan't handle this by itself!
We still have 14 hours\Nuntil it hits the Earth.
The real test is in 9 hours.
entradas.traduzido: O verdadeiro teste é em 9 horas.

entradas.original: After that, it crosses\Nthe point of no return.
Point of no return?
Here, sir.
If the colony breaks through here,
there's no way we can\Nstop such a huge mass.
We have to regain that colony and\Nchange its course before then.
Does the colony still have any propellant?
entradas.traduzido: A colônia ainda tem algum combustível?

entradas.original: It must!
For the final course\Ncorrection toward Jaburo!
entradas.traduzido: Para a sobremesa\Ncorreção em direção a Jaburo!

entradas.original: Where the hell is the Third Orbital Fleet?!
entradas.traduzido: Onde diabos está a Terceira Frota Orbital?!

entradas.original: They're gathering 30000 kilometers\Nin front of...
entradas.traduzido: Eles estão se reunindo a 30.000 quilômetros \N à frente de...

entradas.original: ...the point of no return to\Nintercept them.
They'll never make it...\NWhat is the admiral thinking?!
entradas.traduzido: Eles nunca conseguirão...\NO que o almirante está pensando?!

entradas.original: They're retreating...
Where is he?
The time for discussion has passed.
entradas.traduzido: O tempo para discussão já passou.

entradas.original: Gato?!
An I-Field!
He has one, too?
Range?
entradas.traduzido: Minha voz ecoa pelo corredor enquanto pergunto: "Alguém aí?"

entradas.original: 107000 kilometers to the colony!
Captain!
It's 8 hours, 22 minutes\Nfrom the point of no return!
entradas.traduzido: 8 horas e 22 minutos \N do ponto sem volta!

entradas.original: Order the mobile suit launch!
Not yet!
Not till Unit 03 has opened\Na hole in their line!
The question is whether\NLt. Uraki's strength will hold out.
I never thought we'd end up\Nin a situation like this.
When you think about it,
we've always been haunted\Nby the ghost of Zeon.
Ever since we met the Gundam.
My beams keep being deflected...!
Lt. Commander! A unit armed\Nwith beam weapons can't...!
entradas.traduzido: Tenente-Comandante! Uma unidade armada\Ncom armas de raio não pode...!

entradas.original: Stay out of this!
He's stopped!
The time...!
My weapons...!
{\i1}Gundam! This is the Albion!
{\i1}We I've caught up with you!\NReturn to ship for resupply!
entradas.traduzido: {\i1}Eu te alcancei!\NVolte ao navio para reabastecer!

entradas.original: {\i1}Return to ship at once!{\i}
I've almost breached\Ntheir frontline!
Lieutenant Uraki!
You can't take that colony by yourself!
entradas.traduzido: Voce não pode tomar aquela colônia sozinho!

entradas.original: Roger, sir.
Now then, the question is when does\Nthe enemy show up in front of us?
The Federation's Earth Orbital Fleet\Nis mainly Salamis-class ships.
They'll be no problem.
But you weren't expecting them to\Nhit our soft underbelly, were you?
entradas.traduzido: Mas você não esperava que eles \Natingissem nosso ponto fraco, não é mesmo?

entradas.original: The unexpected sometimes happens.\NGato's handling it well.
The unexpected happens, you say?
{\i1}This is battle group no. 72.\NRefueling complete. Moving out!
entradas.traduzido: {\i1}Este é o grupo de batalha número 72.\NRecarga completa. Em movimento!

entradas.original: Admiral, sir! The fleet is\Nrecommencing pursuit now, sir!
Even if we can't catch up\Nwith the enemy,
leave the mop-up\Nof those Zeon to us!
entradas.traduzido: Deixem a limpeza \Ndaqueles Zeon para nós!

entradas.original: Huh?
What did you say, sir?!
{\i1}Begin weapons container\Nswap-out! Yank 'em out!{\i}
Nina...
They came after us?
Engines! Reverse, full!
The enemy? I was followed!
Maura, out of the way!\NI'm taking the Stamen out!
entradas.traduzido: Fora do caminho!\N Estou tirando o Estigma!

entradas.original: {\i1}Don't! You want to\Nfight in your condition?!
They've broken through!
I'm going!
Men are such...!
A-Admiral...!
If we surround them too tightly,\Nthey'll fight to the death.
I wasn't asking you!
Admiral! What's wrong with you?!
No, I mean, what are you trying to\Ndo in this situation?!
You have to send the Earth Orbital Fleet\Nto the front at once!
Jamitov, you son of a bitch!
We have no time for these\Ncrazy schemes, just order an attack!
W-What are you doing?! Let me go!
entradas.traduzido: O que você está fazendo?! Me solta!

entradas.original: Admiral! We don't have time!
Why was the Albion allowed\Nto take Gundam Unit 03?
entradas.traduzido: Por que a Albion foi permitida\N a tomar a Unidade Gundam 03?

entradas.original: We can't count on the Cima Fleet.
entradas.traduzido: Não podemos contar com a frota Cima.

entradas.original: We'll handle it all...\NWith our own hands!
entradas.traduzido: Nós daremos conta de tudo... \N Com as nossas próprias mãos!

entradas.original: {\i1}But, Lt. Commander,\Nyou can't take the strain!
Guradl... I'm the only one\Nwho can defeat that Gundam.
{\i1}Lt. Commander...!
Have I ever looked at the Earth with\Nsuch excitement in my heart?
I'll destroy the Gundam before the\Nenemy appears in front of us!
Simon... How much longer?
{\i1}They're finishing your\Nresupply right now.
No, I mean till the time limit.
{\i1}3 hours, 11 minutes.
Nina...
We're out of time, and there's no\Nprospect of getting any backup...
Nina Purpleton!
Yes, sir?
I'm authorizing you to take a launch.\NI want you off this ship at once.
entradas.traduzido: Estou autorizando você a tomar um lançamento. \N Quero você fora deste navio agora mesmo.

entradas.original: Captain Sinapus... I've chosen\Nto stay here to the very end.
I'm sorry, sir.
Don't expect the military\Nto pay your salary, then.
All right! Gimme a five-minute\Nburn at combat speed one!
entradas.traduzido: Tudo bem! Me dê um cinco-minutos\Nqueima em velocidade de combate um!

entradas.original: Then switch to max thrust!
entradas.traduzido: Em seguida, mude para empuxo máximo!

entradas.original: Cima's fleet is out too far in front...
entradas.traduzido: A frota de Cima está muito à frente...

entradas.original: You hear me?! Stay sharp!\NThink of nothing but what's ahead!
Mistress Cima, we're picking up\Nsomething ahead of us!
It's almost time!
Nice timing.
Don't go, Gato.
Captain, we've picked up\Nsomething to port side! Light!
What? Towards the Earth?
Can you enlarge the image?
The Earth Orbital Fleet?
No... What's that they've set up?
entradas.traduzido: O que é aquilo que eles montaram?

entradas.original: A wishbone!
That ship isn't retreating.\NThey've got guts!
entradas.traduzido: Aquilo não é uma retirada.\N Eles têm coragem!

entradas.original: It's him!
Gato!
Lt. Commander!!!
Distance to point of no return?
entradas.traduzido: Distância até o ponto de não retorno?

entradas.original: 10200 kilometers! 21 minutes to go!
Once we cross it, those annoying\Npests will finally quiet down!
entradas.traduzido: Uma vez que a cruzarmos, aqueles irritantes\Npestis finalmente se calarão!

entradas.original: Just what are you after?
entradas.traduzido: O que você está procurando afinal?

entradas.original: Weren't you going to wag your tail at the\NFederation with me and my fleet at your feet?
Are you going to drop the colony or not?!
entradas.traduzido: Vão abandonar a colônia ou não?

entradas.original: Shut up, old man!
The enemy has breached our frontline!\NThey're closing in!
entradas.traduzido: Inimigos romperam nossas linhas de frente!\N Eles estão se aproximando!

entradas.original: What?!
Monsha! Behind you!
Damn it, I'm not that good!
entradas.traduzido: Maldição, não sou tão bom assim!

entradas.original: Direct hit! Port side MS catapult!
Simon! The time?
The time...?
Four minutes, sir!
Go to hell!!!
To the colony...!
My I-Field!
You're too late!
50 seconds...
30 seconds...
It's passed...
...the point of no return...
The colony is...
...headed for Earth.
It's not over!
We still have to keep it\Nfrom hitting Jaburo!
Captain, we're getting a message\Nfrom the First Orbital Fleet.
What?!
They say the Delaz Fleet\Nhas ceased fire!
entradas.traduzido: A frota Delaz\N parou o fogo!

entradas.original: What does it mean?
Cease fire...?!
Impossible!
{\i1}This is G21. Upper array of\Nthe Solar System II is complete.{\i}
{\i1}This is left wing, W11!\NGot some trouble. Send help!{\i}
entradas.traduzido: {\i1}Essa é a asa esquerda, W11!\NTem problemas aqui. Enviem ajuda!{\i}

entradas.original: There are errors in the operation.\NGet it deployed! Hurry!
entradas.traduzido: \NHá erros na operação. Pega isso e implanta logo!

entradas.original: The enemy's right in front of us!
entradas.traduzido: O inimigo está bem na nossa frente!

entradas.original: A Solar System...!
As you say, sir.
They had a surprise trick\Nto stop the colony drop.
Just heat it up a little and... Boom!
Damn you!
You consider yourself Zeon?!
This is how I've been able to live!
Pushed around by people who are\Nall warm and comfy back at Side 3!
If I have a reason, I'll switch sides!
entradas.traduzido: Se eu tiver um motivo, mudarei de lado!

entradas.original: Admiral!
How pathetic...
I was a fool to try to guide someone...
entradas.traduzido: Eu era um tolo(a) ao tentar guiar alguém...

entradas.original: ...who has no ideals!
The day I'm guided to\Na backwater like Axis...
...is the day I go out of business!
entradas.traduzido: Meu dia de ir embora é hoje!

entradas.original: {\i1}Cima... You treacherous snake!{\i}
Don't move, Gato.
A losing general must\Naccept defeat gracefully.
{\i1}What?!
I wouldn't want my gift to the\NFederation to get damaged.
entradas.traduzido: Não gostaria que meu presente à\N Federação fosse danificado.

entradas.original: Go, Gato.
Gato, see this through.
entradas.traduzido: Gato, veja isso até o fim.

entradas.original: We still have the colony!
Are you insane?!\NWhat are you doing?!
Go! Step over my\Ncorpse and carry on!
entradas.traduzido: Vá! Pise no meu \Ncorpo e continue em frente!

entradas.original: Be quiet!
Will you let her make me into the\Nlaughingstock of space, Gato?!
entradas.traduzido: Não deixarei que ela me torne o \Ntema de risadas do espaço, Gato!

entradas.original: {\i1}You idiot! They're targeting it\Nwith the Solar System right now!
entradas.traduzido: {\i1}Idiota! Eles estão atacando agora mesmo com o Sistema Solar!\N

entradas.original: D-Don't be a fool!
Admiral...
Sieg Zeo—
{\i1}Conspiracies fill and cover\Nover the skies of betrayal.
entradas.traduzido: {\i1}Conspirações enchem e cobrem\Nos céus da traição.

entradas.original: {\i1}The face of a new age emerges.
{\i1}Will the colony finally reach the Earth?
{\i1}Within it, a reunion of love and hate.
{\i1}Now, at the end of the battle,\Nwhat is it Uraki sees?
entradas.traduzido: {\i1}Agora, no final da batalha, \No que Uragi vê?

entradas.original: {\i1}Time slips away as the\Ncurtain falls on the year 0083.
